female.text: Thought we'd talk… truly, madly, deeply – like we used to way back when.

male.text: Wanna talk about that, you gotta start thinkin' larger scale – much larger. Alt and Rogue – tip of the assberg.

female.text: D'she know about Rogue?
Doesn't matter. Seems I'm about fifty years late in gettin' to it.
That and the Smasher thing. Rogue said it herself – prick was just the tip of the iceberg.
And I'm here shriveling, spendin' time with you.
And what about his old flame Anna Maria, her fire smothered as she languored helplessly in virtuspace?
Doesn't give a lick about helping me. Wants to wipe Mikoshi.
Corps practically wiped the Afterlife off this city's face. Rogue was the last denizen standing. Who kept her afloat?
Not to me. Don't forget, I've spent the last fifty years stuck in my head.
More like, prove myself wrong. Dead wrong when I told her we had nothing, were nothing and shared nothing but sex.
Grayson knew her, knew she'd worked for Smasher.

male.text: Kerry used to spend all kinds of time and energy tryin' to get me into bed with him.
Hm. Nope, that's a new one.
Oh, come on – "sleeping with him?" He fucked you once, end of story.

female.text: And if she worked for Smasher, she was open to working for anybody.
I've had fuck all to do with it. Alt's out there fractaling, globulating, becoming a bigger and better AI.
Hm. Could be.

male.text: A little ironic, actually, that he finally got what he wanted thanks to you.
Wouldn't get used to it if I were you.

female.text: I knew she'd change, transform... All started when she went silicon, hit the net.
Say what you want, that was real. Human.
Guess I just never thought she'd stop giving a fuck about me so completely.
Antonio, fifty years in a coma, wakes up to find he's a woman! Can he forgive Manuela her infidelity?
Fuck me, V. So do I.
Hey! Over here!
V, try to get inside.
But give up your ideals, and no amount of eddies can buy 'em back.
But if you think in my heart of hearts I wanna be the next teen idol, think again. Don't give half a fuck about that commercial shit!
True. Played where we could. Parks, old factories, underground clubs...
Could stand a little more stage presence, fingering's all wrong, loses the tempo more than he keeps it, but – not bad.
Ladies and gentlemen, a critic. Chill, choomba. Ain't half bad.
Hmm... Y'know, Rainbow Cadenza's not far from here. Club we played till the band fell apart.
First, she was sure I was dead already. Second, I'd never do that to her.
Know why? Technique's second-rate. But the feeling – that's what counts.
Guy's hurtin', got somethin' he can't take. And it shows.
Great spot. Place for people with their heads on straight. Maybe they'll know somethin'.
Just you fuckin' try.
Know what? You're right – I failed. Corpo-tyrants still run this town, just like fifty years ago.
Rogue should be here any minute.
Listen to that guy. How'd you rate his chops?
Rogue's never said no to me, ever.
Don't worry. I'll be gentle. Ya might even enjoy it.
Had an audience from the start. Some recorded our stuff, didn't even know who we were.
Ey, 'ey, 'ey, V! Wait a sec!
Don't make me laugh. No time for playin' my way to the top. Was too busy shakin' the world awake.
That is the plan.
So – you ready?
No idea you were such a materialist. Could almost cry. Almost.
And you pay for it. You spend your lyrics layin' waste to the big record corps, who's gonna sign you then?
Don't have to.
I'm sorry, whose?
Hey, you relax…
Great! You checkin' out again?!
Our ticket, huh? OK, I see your angle.
Don't you get it?! Time is something we are fresh out of!
With me, it'd be just like old times.
It's our only chance.
I warned you.
And you can't stand on your own two feet.
You wanna lead an all-out assault on 'Saka Tower...?
What's that fuckin' give us?!
We'll blast our way into 'Saka Tower just like we did back in the day. Then find the way inside Mikoshi.
Hey, you'd better relax.
You don't want those people involved, their lives on the line, possibly on your conscience.
Won't take a risk this big with someone she still sees in merc diapers.
C'mon, face the facts.
Listen, I know you and Panam got a thing going. I get it, I do.
Made the same mistake myself, once.
Right about that, but that's why I'll bring Rogue. She's not rusted through just yet. Plus, she owes me.
I wanna save your life.
Jesus Christ. You can barely stand on your own two feet!
Jesus, look at you. Can't even--
Then we got a real fuckin' problem, don't we?!
Without that porcelain cunt's help, that's for damn sure.
Shit, we could be hours from it, now, V.
I'll get us to fuckin' Mikoshi.
Not this time.
Well, let me tell ya somethin' – the corpo kleptocracy is not an option!
Our one hope is sittin' at the Afterlife right now and her name is Rogue.
V?
See what I'm gettin' at?
And what's that give us?
You already tried this with amateurs... Both know how that ended.
I'm showin' you what it's like to feel fuckin' trapped.
Listen up, V. Those guys are trailer tuggers.
An assault on Arasaka's just not another convoy to 'jack.
That 'Saka cunt's scrambled your circuits.
Pop some pseudoendotrizine, scooch and lemme get behind the wheel.
But I know you still don't understand how these leeches operate.
She's sunk her teeth deep into you. Not gonna be able to pry yourself out.
The gates to Mikoshi? Yeah, beneath 'Saka Tower.
While I'm good to go, body listens to me.
Asked you. Warned you. But you've insisted on not giving a shit.
You think workin' with the corpocunt is gonna sweeten the deal.
Yeah, one-way ticket to the city morgue.
Now this porcelain cunt's gonna use you in her fancy scheme.
It's gotta work! We breach the tower, Alt cracks open Mikoshi, then I fuck up that--
With her experience? Her resources? Her connections?
She met you face to face. She revealed her plan.
Won't find anyone better in NC.
I'll convince her. After all, we know a thing or two about ops like this.
But that's what makes it such a shitty idea. You don't wanna rope her into this.
What am I doing?
Rogue and I will handle this. Just like we used to.
Hear me, bitch?! A bullet to the fucking brain!

male.text: Hear me, asshole?! A bullet to the fucking brain!

female.text: Oh, V, V – you never learn, do you?
Sure hope so, V.
Just be careful, V.
People don't change. 'Specially not people like Kirk.
You laugh – but fifty years in purgatory? Enough time for a guy to get his head on straight. Come to some conclusions.
Easy enough in Night City. Real trick's survivin' long enough to spend it.
It's just a copy of the engram – I'm out there somewhere, gotta be...
Who you work for? Start talkin'!
I'll find a way!
How the fuck should I know?
I'll take control.
The fuck kinda joytoy are you supposed to be?
Fucking chip...
Need a smoke. Where'd you stash yours?
Not like that!
You hear me?!
Then go out and get some. Just need one last one!
Fuck, fuck, fuck, fuckin' fuck...
Rip the thing out myself!
I can feel it... our minds... touching...
You hear me?!
Do it. What're you waiting for?!
I'm like mold on fruit... creepin' into you… nothin' I can do about it.
Stick some iron in your mouth and pull the trigger.
Gotta get out of here, understand?
Lead to the head, only thing that'll fix this.
Fuck!
I'd puke if I fuckin' could!
And I'll kill anyone who gets in my way. You included.
Corpo or not, without chrome we all look like the same idiotic, bullet-riddled sacks of meat.
Seen a lot of shady mugs in my time, but that guy right there... Phwoo. That one takes the cake.
All right, load him in the back.
Dirty rags, mold, roaches, rat shit, and chef's own pube salad with "special" ranch dressing.
Ha. House is rakin' it in. Wonder what the boss has to say about it.
Hmm, lemme guess. Chicken daily special comes with five different sides.
Trevor's ride. Shot up pretty nicely.
Well, what do we have here.
Time to go home, Trevor.
See where this trail of blood leads.
I'm intrigued in either case.
BOOM – dead, and all eyes're on the corp. Least for a little while.
Each shell's like a signature, leavin' behind a trail.
Hint 1 – Militech!
Or they're gearin' up for a different sort of party.
Hint 2 – Valentinos!
Can you spot the two things that don't match?
Well, well, either they're plannin' a costume party...
Militech ammo...
Same shit, different assholes. And every time they think "this time'll be different." Well, we get what we fucking deserve.
Dude's got his back pinned against the wall, alone.
Every netrunner ends up the same way – brainfried by some corpo ICE.
Well… There it is.
Poor son of a bitch.
Not the van we're lookin' for.
Look, V, it's you in the near future.
Some things never change. Gonks tick the ballot and think they're actually makin' a choice.
Check out these tracks, though. Go deeper down the tunnel.
Only ever been one choice in this city – corruption.
Better than buryin' your head in the sand.
Maybe you can't, but Arasaka? Militech? Biotechnica? Kang Tao? Should I go on?
They discarded him, twisted him up. He moved forward only way he knew how. I get it.
Maybe this murder Holt idea's not so bad? At least it'd piss a few people off.
Where's the shame? Where is the fuckin' shame?
See, V? People in the city're eatin' out of tubes, sleepin' rough, and here... Golden shitters.
Don't know what he did to deserve what's comin', but his music taste is reason enough to drop him.
I remember that gig. Blew my vocal cords out so hard I couldn't speak for a week.
No need to ask anything. Just spit in their face.
That's what peeps with bad taste always say.
What, the gig?
Sweet Jesus... You hear that? Do ya hear what they're playin'?
One more reason this city could use another nuke.
No quicker way to lose your mind.
Huh, would you look at that. We were in the same unit, him and me.
We nail one asshole to the wall and another rises up in the polls. Politics as fucking usual.
Yeah? Well it'd be easier than slicing heads off a fuckin' hydra.
From his ink. That, and being scared shitless.
The hell we went through in Mexico... The things we saw... What we did...
